(() => {
"use strict";
var __webpack_modules__ = ({
670
/*!**************!*\
  !*** ./a.js ***!
  \**************/
/*! namespace exports */
/*! export effectValue [provided] [used in main] [renamed to D] -> ./e.js effectValue */
/*! export pureValue [provided] [unused] [renamed to e] -> ./d.js pureValue */
/*! runtime requirements: __webpack_require__.d, __webpack_require__.*, __webpack_require__, __webpack_exports__ */
/*! Statement with side_effects in source code at ./a.js<LINE_COL_RANGE> */
(__unused_rspack_module, __webpack_exports__, __webpack_require__) {
__webpack_require__.d(__webpack_exports__, {
  D: () => (/* reexport safe */ _b__rspack_import_0.D)
});
/* import */ var _b__rspack_import_0 = __webpack_require__(/*! ./b */ 899);
const state =
	globalThis.__configCases_sideEffects_reexportPreservedEvalChainPartialRetarget ??
	(globalThis.__configCases_sideEffects_reexportPreservedEvalChainPartialRetarget = {
		order: []
	});

state.order.push("a");
state.a = "a";




},
899
/*!**************!*\
  !*** ./b.js ***!
  \**************/
/*! namespace exports */
/*! export effectValue [provided] [used in main] [renamed to D] -> ./e.js effectValue */
/*! export pureValue [provided] [unused] [renamed to e] -> ./d.js pureValue */
/*! runtime requirements: __webpack_require__.d, __webpack_require__.*, __webpack_require__, __webpack_exports__ */
(__unused_rspack_module, __webpack_exports__, __webpack_require__) {
__webpack_require__.d(__webpack_exports__, {
  D: () => (/* reexport safe */ _c__rspack_import_0.D)
});
/* import */ var _c__rspack_import_0 = __webpack_require__(/*! ./c */ 964);



},
964
/*!**************!*\
  !*** ./c.js ***!
  \**************/
/*! namespace exports */
/*! export effectValue [provided] [used in main] [renamed to D] -> ./e.js effectValue */
/*! export pureValue [provided] [unused] [renamed to e] -> ./d.js pureValue */
/*! runtime requirements: __webpack_require__.d, __webpack_require__.*, __webpack_require__, __webpack_exports__ */
(__unused_rspack_module, __webpack_exports__, __webpack_require__) {
__webpack_require__.d(__webpack_exports__, {
  D: () => (/* reexport safe */ _e__rspack_import_0.D)
});
/* import */ var _e__rspack_import_0 = __webpack_require__(/*! ./e */ 210);




},
425
/*!**************!*\
  !*** ./d.js ***!
  \**************/
/*! namespace exports */
/*! export pureValue [provided] [used in main] [renamed to e] */
/*! runtime requirements: __webpack_require__.d, __webpack_require__.*, __webpack_exports__ */
(__unused_rspack_module, __webpack_exports__, __webpack_require__) {
__webpack_require__.d(__webpack_exports__, {
  e: () => (pureValue)
});
function pureValue() {
	return "d";
}


},
210
/*!**************!*\
  !*** ./e.js ***!
  \**************/
/*! namespace exports */
/*! export effectValue [provided] [used in main] [renamed to D] */
/*! runtime requirements: __webpack_require__.d, __webpack_require__.*, __webpack_exports__ */
/*! Statement with side_effects in source code at ./e.js<LINE_COL_RANGE> */
(__unused_rspack_module, __webpack_exports__, __webpack_require__) {
__webpack_require__.d(__webpack_exports__, {
  D: () => (effectValue)
});
const state =
	globalThis.__configCases_sideEffects_reexportPreservedEvalChainPartialRetarget ??
	(globalThis.__configCases_sideEffects_reexportPreservedEvalChainPartialRetarget = {
		order: []
	});

state.order.push("e");
state.e = "e";

function effectValue() {
	return "e";
}


},

});
// The module cache
var __webpack_module_cache__ = {};

// The require function
function __webpack_require__(moduleId) {

// Check if module is in cache
var cachedModule = __webpack_module_cache__[moduleId];
if (cachedModule !== undefined) {
return cachedModule.exports;
}
// Create a new module (and put it into the cache)
var module = (__webpack_module_cache__[moduleId] = {
exports: {}
});
// Execute the module function
__webpack_modules__[moduleId](module, module.exports, __webpack_require__);

// Return the exports of the module
return module.exports;

}

// webpack/runtime/define_property_getters
(() => {
__webpack_require__.d = (exports, definition) => {
	for(var key in definition) {
        if(__webpack_require__.o(definition, key) && !__webpack_require__.o(exports, key)) {
            Object.defineProperty(exports, key, { enumerable: true, get: definition[key] });
        }
    }
};
})();
// webpack/runtime/has_own_property
(() => {
__webpack_require__.o = (obj, prop) => (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(obj, prop))
})();
var __webpack_exports__ = {};
// This entry needs to be wrapped in an IIFE because it needs to be isolated against other modules in the chunk.
(() => {

/*!******************!*\
  !*** ./index.js ***!
  \******************/
/*! namespace exports */
/*! runtime requirements: __webpack_require__ */
/*! Statement with side_effects in source code at ./index.js<LINE_COL>-42 */
/* import */ var _a__rspack_import_0 = __webpack_require__(/*! ./a */ 670);
/* import */ var _a__rspack_import_1 = __webpack_require__(/*! ./a */ 425);


const fs = require("fs");
const path = require("path");

const state =
	globalThis.__configCases_sideEffects_reexportPreservedEvalChainPartialRetarget ??
	(globalThis.__configCases_sideEffects_reexportPreservedEvalChainPartialRetarget = {
		order: []
	});
const bundlePath = path.resolve(__dirname, "bundle0.js");
const generated = fs.readFileSync(bundlePath, "utf-8");

state.order.push("index");

function getModuleBlock(source, moduleId) {
	const start = source.indexOf(`*** ${moduleId} ***`);
	expect(start).toBeGreaterThan(-1);
	const end = source.indexOf('\nconst fs = require("fs");', start);
	expect(end).toBeGreaterThan(start);
	return source.slice(start, end);
}

function getModuleId(source, moduleId) {
	const start = source.indexOf(`*** ${moduleId} ***`);
	expect(start).toBeGreaterThan(-1);
	const lines = source.slice(0, start).split("\n");

	for (let i = lines.length - 1; i >= 0; i -= 1) {
		const line = lines[i].trim();
		if (/^\d+$/.test(line)) {
			return line;
		}
	}

	throw new Error(`Cannot find module id for ${moduleId}`);
}

it("should preserve side effects and execution order", () => {
	expect((0,_a__rspack_import_1/* .pureValue */.e)()).toBe("d");
	expect((0,_a__rspack_import_0/* .effectValue */.D)()).toBe("e");
	expect(state.a).toBe("a");
	expect(state.e).toBe("e");
	expect(state.order).toEqual(["e", "a", "index"]);
});

it("should retarget only the side-effect-free binding", () => {
	const indexBlock = getModuleBlock(generated, "./index.js");
	const aModuleId = getModuleId(generated, "./a.js");
	const dModuleId = getModuleId(generated, "./d.js");
	const eModuleId = getModuleId(generated, "./e.js");

	expect(indexBlock).toContain(`__webpack_require__(/*! ./a */ ${aModuleId})`);
	expect(indexBlock).toContain(`__webpack_require__(/*! ./a */ ${dModuleId})`);
	expect(indexBlock).not.toContain(`__webpack_require__(/*! ./a */ ${eModuleId})`);
	expect(generated).toMatchFileSnapshotSync(path.join(__SNAPSHOT__, "bundle0.js.txt"));
});

afterAll(() => {
	delete globalThis.__configCases_sideEffects_reexportPreservedEvalChainPartialRetarget;
});

})();

})()
;
